name: Order Received → Notify Supplier
description: When a new order is placed, automatically notify the supplier via email

name: Payment Confirmed → Update Inventory
description: Deduct inventory when payment is confirmed

name: Supplier Ships → Notify Customer
description: Send tracking number to customer when supplier ships

name: Low Stock Alert → Admin
description: Notify admin when stock falls below threshold

name: Return Requested → Create Task
description: Create a support task when a return is requested

name: Order Confirmed → Update Finance
description: Record revenue when order is confirmed

name: Supplier Confirmed → Update PO
description: Mark purchase order as confirmed

name: Stock Out → Alert Warehouse
description: Alert warehouse when product goes out of stock

name: Order Delivered → Request Review
description: Send review request after delivery

name: New Customer → Welcome Series
description: Send welcome email sequence to new customers

name: Weekly Inventory Report
description: Send weekly inventory summary to admin

name: Refund Processed → Update Analytics
description: Record refund in analytics

name: High-Value Order → Flag for Review
description: Flag orders over $500 for manual review

name: Supplier Delay → Notify Customer
description: Automatically notify customer if supplier reports delay

name: Inventory Reorder → Create PO
description: Automatically create purchase order for low stock items

name: Return Completed → Update Inventory
description: Add returned items back to inventory

name: Bulk Order → Notify Warehouse
description: Notify warehouse for orders with 5+ items

name: Abandoned Cart → Send Reminder
description: Send email reminder for abandoned carts

name: Monthly Performance Report
description: Generate and send monthly performance report

name: Supplier Rating Update
description: Update supplier ratings based on delivery performance
